basis: YDB description "Illegal naked global reference" matches AnnoStd M1 "naked indicator undefined"
YDB description "Random number generator argument must be greater than or equal to one" matches AnnoStd M3 "$Random seed less than 1"
YDB description "No argument to $SELECT was true" matches AnnoStd M4 "no true condition in $Select"
YDB description "Undefined local variable" matches AnnoStd M6 "undefined lvn"; YDB errproc.rst worked example shows ECODE pair ",M6,Z150373850,"
YDB description "Global variable undefined" matches AnnoStd M7 "undefined gvn"
YDB description "Attempt to divide by zero" matches AnnoStd M9 "divide by zero"; YDB errproc.rst worked example shows ECODE pair ",M9,Z150373210,"
YDB "Quit cannot take an argument in this context" matches AnnoStd M16 "argumented Quit not allowed"
YDB "Quit from an extrinsic must have an argument" matches AnnoStd M17 "argumented Quit required"
YDB "Length specified for fixed length read less than or equal to zero" matches AnnoStd M18 "fixed length Read not greater than zero"
YDB "MERGE operation not possible. xxxx is a descendant of yyyy" matches AnnoStd M19 "cannot copy a tree or subtree into itself"
YDB "Invalid operation: fractional power of negative number" matches AnnoStd M28 "mathematical function, parameter out of range"
YDB "Unsupported mnemonicspace" relates to AnnoStd M31 "controlmnemonic used for device without a mnemonicspace selected"
YDB "Cannot release LOCK(s) held prior to current TSTART" matches AnnoStd M41 "invalid Lock argument within a TRANSACTION"
YDB "Cannot QUIT out of a routine with an active transaction" matches AnnoStd M42 "invalid Quit within a TRANSACTION"
YDB "Transaction is not in progress" matches AnnoStd M44 "invalid command outside of a TRANSACTION"
YDB "Invalid command keyword encountered" partially matches AnnoStd M45 "invalid Goto reference" (broader scope; pending refinement)
YDB "Variable name length exceeds maximum allowed" matches AnnoStd M56 "name length limit exceeded"
YDB "This label has been previously defined" matches AnnoStd M57 "more than one defining occurrence of label in routine"
